\tzpentry{ID3570}{Dipole Zeta-Regularized Zeta Function Laplacian Operator}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3570 introduces Dipole Zeta-Regularized Zeta Function Laplacian Operator as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \zeta_{\rm dipole}=\nabla^2\Psi_{\rm dipole}=-\frac{2A_d}{R^2}\cos\theta. \]
